title: Multi-Org Governance Audit
subtitle: MSP/Partner 視角 · 跨 5 個 org 的存取健康 + 合規檢視
compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name}))); const isExpired = d => d.license_status === 'expired'; cf.gov_summary = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const accessible = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok').length; const blocked = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExpired).length; return `管理 ${orgs.length} 個 org：${accessible} 個完全可見、${blocked} 個被 RBAC/Plan 擋住；可見的 ${all.length} 個設備中有 ${exp} 個 license 已過期。`; }; cf.org_total = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).length; cf.org_accessible = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok').length; cf.org_accessible_sub = (data) => { const partial = (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; return partial > 0 ? `+${partial} 部分受限` : 'fully visible'; }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.fleet_total_sub = (data) => `${flat(data).filter(isExpired).length} 過期`; cf.member_total = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).length; cf.member_admin_count = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).filter(m => m.org_role === 'admin').length; cf.member_admin_sub = (data) => `${cf.member_admin_count(data)} admins`; cf.org_access_segments = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const fully = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok'); const partial = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status !== 'ok'); const rbac = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'forbidden' || o.inv_status === 'forbidden').filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok'); const plan = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'payment_required'); return [ { label: 'Fully Accessible', value: fully.length, severity: 'success' }, { label: 'Partially Visible', value: partial.length, severity: 'warning' }, { label: 'RBAC Blocked (403)', value: rbac.length, severity: 'critical' }, { label: 'Plan Blocked (402)', value: plan.length, severity: 'muted' } ].filter(s => s.value > 0); }; cf.license_status_segments = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExpired).length; const act = all.length - exp; return [ { label: 'Expired', value: exp, severity: 'critical' }, { label: 'Active', value: act, severity: 'success' } ].filter(s => s.value > 0); }; cf.cross_org_findings = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const findings = []; const blocked = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok'); if (blocked.length) findings.push({ label: `${blocked.length} org 無法稽核：${blocked.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}` }); const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExpired); if (exp.length) findings.push({ label: `${exp.length} 設備 license 過期（${[...new Set(exp.map(d => d.org_name))].join(', ')}）` }); const members = data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []; const stale = members.filter(m => m.last_login_time && (Date.now() - m.last_login_time) > 365 * 86400000); if (stale.length) findings.push({ label: `${stale.length} 個 stale account 持有權限（>1 年沒登入）` }); const orgsNoDev = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && (o.networks || []).length > 0 && (o.devices || []).length === 0); if (orgsNoDev.length) findings.push({ label: `${orgsNoDev.length} org 有 network 但無設備：${orgsNoDev.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}` }); return findings; }; })();

sections.title: Cross-Org Findings · 待處理事項
sections.empty_text: 沒有 cross-org governance 風險

sections.title: Team Members · Main_Org (其他 org 待 RD 開放跨 org 成員 API)

en.title: Multi-Org Governance Audit
en.subtitle: MSP/Partner lens · cross-5-org access health + compliance review
en.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name}))); const isExp = d => d.license_status === 'expired'; cf.gov_summary = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const acc = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok').length; const blocked = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; return `Managing ${orgs.length} orgs: ${acc} fully visible, ${blocked} blocked by RBAC/Plan; ${exp} of ${all.length} visible devices have expired licenses.`; }; cf.org_total = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).length; cf.org_accessible = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok').length; cf.org_accessible_sub = (data) => { const partial = (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; return partial > 0 ? `+${partial} partially limited` : 'fully visible'; }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.fleet_total_sub = (data) => `${flat(data).filter(isExp).length} expired`; cf.member_total = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).length; cf.member_admin_count = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).filter(m => m.org_role === 'admin').length; cf.member_admin_sub = (data) => `${cf.member_admin_count(data)} admins`; cf.org_access_segments = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const fully = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok'); const partial = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status !== 'ok'); const rbac = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'forbidden' || o.inv_status === 'forbidden').filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok'); const plan = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'payment_required'); return [ { label: 'Fully Accessible', value: fully.length, severity: 'success' }, { label: 'Partially Visible', value: partial.length, severity: 'warning' }, { label: 'RBAC Blocked (403)', value: rbac.length, severity: 'critical' }, { label: 'Plan Blocked (402)', value: plan.length, severity: 'muted' } ].filter(s => s.value > 0); }; cf.license_status_segments = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; const act = all.length - exp; return [ { label: 'Expired', value: exp, severity: 'critical' }, { label: 'Active', value: act, severity: 'success' } ].filter(s => s.value > 0); }; cf.cross_org_findings = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const findings = []; const blocked = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok'); if (blocked.length) findings.push({ label: `${blocked.length} org(s) cannot be audited: ${blocked.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}` }); const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); if (exp.length) findings.push({ label: `${exp.length} devices with expired licenses (in ${[...new Set(exp.map(d => d.org_name))].join(', ')})` }); const members = data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []; const stale = members.filter(m => m.last_login_time && (Date.now() - m.last_login_time) > 365 * 86400000); if (stale.length) findings.push({ label: `${stale.length} stale accounts still hold permissions (>1y no login)` }); const orgsNoDev = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && (o.networks || []).length > 0 && (o.devices || []).length === 0); if (orgsNoDev.length) findings.push({ label: `${orgsNoDev.length} org(s) with networks but no devices: ${orgsNoDev.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}` }); return findings; }; })();

ja.title: マルチ Org ガバナンス監査
ja.subtitle: MSP / Partner 視点 · 5 つの Org のアクセス健全性とコンプライアンス確認
ja.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name}))); const isExp = d => d.license_status === 'expired'; cf.gov_summary = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const acc = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok').length; const blocked = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok' || o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; return `${orgs.length} 個の Org を管理：${acc} 個が完全可視、${blocked} 個が RBAC / Plan により制限。可視 ${all.length} デバイス中 ${exp} 台のライセンスが期限切れ。`; }; cf.org_total = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).length; cf.org_accessible = (data) => (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok').length; cf.org_accessible_sub = (data) => { const partial = (data.topology?.orgs || []).filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status !== 'ok').length; return partial > 0 ? `+${partial} 部分制限` : '完全可視'; }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.fleet_total_sub = (data) => `${flat(data).filter(isExp).length} 期限切れ`; cf.member_total = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).length; cf.member_admin_count = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).filter(m => m.org_role === 'admin').length; cf.member_admin_sub = (data) => `${cf.member_admin_count(data)} admin`; cf.org_access_segments = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const fully = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status === 'ok'); const partial = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && o.inv_status !== 'ok'); const rbac = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'forbidden' || o.inv_status === 'forbidden').filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok'); const plan = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'payment_required'); return [ { label: '完全アクセス可', value: fully.length, severity: 'success' }, { label: '部分可視', value: partial.length, severity: 'warning' }, { label: 'RBAC 制限 (403)', value: rbac.length, severity: 'critical' }, { label: 'Plan 制限 (402)', value: plan.length, severity: 'muted' } ].filter(s => s.value > 0); }; cf.license_status_segments = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; const act = all.length - exp; return [ { label: '期限切れ', value: exp, severity: 'critical' }, { label: '有効', value: act, severity: 'success' } ].filter(s => s.value > 0); }; cf.cross_org_findings = (data) => { const orgs = data.topology?.orgs || []; const findings = []; const blocked = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status !== 'ok'); if (blocked.length) findings.push({ label: `${blocked.length} 個の Org が監査不可：${blocked.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}` }); const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); if (exp.length) findings.push({ label: `${exp.length} 台のデバイスが期限切れ（${[...new Set(exp.map(d => d.org_name))].join(', ')}）` }); const members = data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []; const stale = members.filter(m => m.last_login_time && (Date.now() - m.last_login_time) > 365 * 86400000); if (stale.length) findings.push({ label: `${stale.length} 個の休眠アカウントが権限を保持（1 年以上未ログイン）` }); const orgsNoDev = orgs.filter(o => o.hv_status === 'ok' && (o.networks || []).length > 0 && (o.devices || []).length === 0); if (orgsNoDev.length) findings.push({ label: `${orgsNoDev.length} 個の Org にネットワークはあるがデバイス未配備：${orgsNoDev.map(o => o.org_name).join(', ')}` }); return findings; }; })();
